rounds: Pink toes held all week, necklace and black bag to Lavendra, Noskin loafers, full picture — he took that round clean. Deliberate pink thong to Balmoral, active choice before anyone was even watching — that one's his too. But the poncho came out again at Balmoral, and the wetsuit moment had him clocking his toes around the swim group. Joy police got those. Pink hat and knit cardigan stayed home two weeks ago — named, but still happened.
pattern: They're quietest with strangers and loudest exactly when his people are watching.
focus: Look at one daily routine this week and ask — is this what I'd choose, or just what I do?
